$comment: THEME = confetti (the flagship, and the default theme baked into the build). This file is the BRAND-KIT CONTRACT: the handful of input tokens a theme sets. Everything visible derives from these via the wiring in tokens/semantic/theme-roles.json (roles → inputs, emitted once under :root as var() refs). A downstream demo creates a new theme by overriding ONLY these inputs in its own [data-theme='<name>'] block — no changes to Confetti. Inputs reference primitives; neutrals (surfaces/text/borders) come from the active mode. Emitted under [data-theme='confetti'].

primary.comment: brand colour — drives text.accent, primary action fill, ghost hover

accent.$comment: The four decorative 'confetti' hues (bold tone). A demo may repoint these or leave Confetti's.

shape.$comment: The theme's shape personality. control = pills/buttons, container = cards, border = the sticker outline weight.

font.$comment: The theme's typefaces. display = headings/titles, body = prose/content, label = mono UI (buttons, badges, eyebrows). A demo repoints these to change the whole system's type.

interaction.$comment: How filled buttons respond on hover. Confetti lifts onto the hard sticker shadow (no lightness change). button-lift = the transform; hover-brightness = 1 (none). The hover shadow lives on the mode axis (shadow.button-lift).
